decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing mana acceleration through cards like Mishra's Workshop, Grim Monolith, and various Mox cards to quickly cast powerful artifacts and creatures. The goal is to establish a board presence early on and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive threats such as Glaring Fleshraker and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain. The inclusion of cards like Time Vault and The One Ring allow for additional win conditions if the aggro strategy is disrupted. By combining speed and powerful artifacts, this deck aims to quickly close out games through efficient damage output.

This Vintage 1 vs 1 Aggro deck focuses on using Bazaar of Baghdad to quickly fill the graveyard with aggressive threats like Vengevine and Hollow One, while also disrupting opponents with countermagic like Force of Will and Mindbreak Trap. The deck utilizes the Madness mechanic with cards like Blazing Rootwalla and Squee, Goblin Nabob to maintain card advantage and pressure the opponent. With a combination of fast threats and disruptive spells, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using Mishra's Workshop and Grim Monolith to play powerful artifacts like The One Ring and Glaring Fleshraker. Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Karn, the Great Creator provide additional control and utility, while cards like Manifold Key and Mystic Forge help the deck maintain momentum. The deck also includes disruption elements like Pithing Needle and Chalice of the Void to hinder opponents' strategies. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggressive threats and disruptive plays.

This aggressive MUD deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of mana acceleration, disruptive effects, and powerful threats. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Null Rod, Thorn of Amethyst, and Sphere of Resistance while applying pressure with creatures like Scrawling Crawler, Patchwork Automaton, and Stonecoil Serpent. Additionally, the deck includes powerful artifacts like Mystic Forge, Karn, the Great Creator, and Golos, Tireless Pilgrim to provide additional value and versatility in a fast-paced Vintage 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on small, efficient creatures and disruptive spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. It utilizes a mix of aggressive creatures like Kishla Skimmer and Collector Ouphe, alongside powerful disruption like Force of Will and Abrupt Decay. The inclusion of Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion allows for recurring valuable creatures from the graveyard. The deck aims to establish early board presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan, ultimately overwhelming them with relentless aggression and control.

This deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining a strong board presence with efficient creatures and versatile spells. By utilizing powerful cards like Force of Will, Abrupt Decay, and Collector Ouphe, it can control the game and pressure the opponent's life total. The inclusion of Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion provides additional value and resilience in longer games. With a focus on tempo and disruption, this deck is designed to outmaneuver and outlast the opponent in Vintage 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive artifacts quickly to overwhelm the opponent. It aims to generate a large amount of mana with cards like Grim Monolith and Mishra's Workshop to power out threats like Glaring Fleshraker and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain. The inclusion of cards like The One Ring and City of Traitors allow for explosive starts, while cards like Manifold Key and Time Vault provide alternative win conditions. Overall, the deck looks to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing a strong board presence and closing out the game quickly.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with powerful artifacts and using aggressive strategies to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing powerful artifacts such as Mishra's Workshop, Grim Monolith, and Soul-Guide Lantern, the deck aims to control the game and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The combination of fast mana sources like Black Lotus and Moxen allow for explosive plays and early aggression. Additionally, cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain provide additional ways to control and manipulate the battlefield to secure victory.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disruption and card advantage, utilizing powerful spells like Force of Will, Ancestral Recall, and Dig Through Time to control the game. With a mix of counter spells, removal, and card draw, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and disrupt their game plan with cards like Mindbreak Trap and Fatal Push. The inclusion of Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion adds further resilience and recursion to the deck, making it a formidable force in the Vintage 1 vs 1 format.

This deck aims to control the game by utilizing powerful cards like Force of Will, Mana Drain, and Gifts Ungiven. It also includes key combo pieces like Brain Freeze and Underworld Breach to push towards a win condition. The inclusion of Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion adds additional value and flexibility to the deck. The mana base is optimized with powerful land cards like Tolarian Academy and Island','','');">Volcanic Island to ensure smooth gameplay and access to different colors of mana. Overall, this deck is focused on controlling the game and outplaying opponents with powerful spells and interactions.

The focus of this deck is to quickly assemble powerful artifact combos, ramping up mana production with Mishra's Workshop and Grim Monolith to play big threats like Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and The One Ring. Utilizing cards like Manifold Key and Voltaic Key to untap key artifacts like Time Vault and The Fantasticar for extra turns, while also disrupting opponents with cards like Chalice of the Void and Pithing Needle. This deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggressive artifact creatures and powerful mana acceleration.

The deck relies on fast mana acceleration such as Moxen and Grim Monolith to power out powerful artifacts like Coveted Jewel and The One Ring. Tezzeret, Cruel Captain provides card advantage while also tutoring for key pieces like Time Vault. The deck also uses control elements like Force of Will and Sink into Stupor to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Lastly, cards like Tinker and Mystic Forge provide additional ways to assemble combos and generate value. Overall, the deck aims to assemble powerful artifact combos and outvalue the opponent.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's spells while establishing a fast and aggressive board presence. By using hatebears like Archon of Emeria and Chancellor of the Annex, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's strategy by taxing their resources and limiting their game plan. Meanwhile, the aggro aspect of the deck is supported by creatures like Anointed Peacekeeper and White Plume Adventurer, backed up by efficient mana acceleration from cards like Ancient Tomb and Chrome Mox. The key concept is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with an aggressive creature base.

The deck focuses on putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Archon of Emeria and Chancellor of the Annex while disrupting their game plan with cards like Void Mirror and Wasteland. The hatebears, such as Anointed Peacekeeper and Clarion Conqueror, help slow down the opponent's strategy while also advancing your own game plan. The deck also includes mana acceleration from cards like Moxes and lands like Ancient Tomb to quickly deploy threats and maintain board presence. Using disruptive elements and efficient creatures, the deck aims to control the game and secure victory through combat damage.

The deck focuses on utilizing the graveyard as a resource to quickly fill it with creatures like Prized Amalgam, Narcomoeba, and Golgari Thug through cards like Bazaar of Baghdad and Serum Powder. By milling cards and discarding creatures, it aims to trigger powerful abilities from cards like Creeping Chill and Silversmote Ghoul, creating a fast and aggressive playstyle. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Force of Will and Chalice of the Void to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with disruptive artifacts like Sphere of Resistance, Trinisphere, and Null Rod, while also utilizing powerful mana acceleration from Mishra's Workshop and the Moxen to bring out threats like Golos, Tireless Pilgrim and Lodestone Golem. The deck aims to lock down the opponent's resources with cards like Wasteland and Strip Mine, while also generating card advantage and additional mana through cards like Mystic Forge and Inventors' Fair. The deck combines aggressive strategies with resource denial to control the game and overwhelm the opponent.
